name: Louis Berkhof
title: Theologian
bio: Dutch-American Reformed theologian whose 'Systematic Theology' became the standard textbook in Reformed seminaries for decades. Born in the Netherlands, he emigrated to Michigan as a child and spent his career teaching at Calvin Theological Seminary.
faith: Berkhof's 'Systematic Theology' has trained generations of Reformed pastors. He wrote with precision and clarity, making complex Reformed doctrine accessible without oversimplifying it. His work represents the best of the Dutch Reformed theological tradition in America.
tagline: His Systematic Theology trained generations of Reformed pastors
